Docs.param: A unique identifier for the agent.

Arbitrary metadata associated with this agent.
Options that were used to create this agent.

Docs.param: The ID of the user who created the message (if applicable).
The ID of the agent who created the message (if applicable).
A unique identifier for this message.
A unique run ID, if this message was generated by a run process.
The thread to which this message belongs.

The contents of the message. Please note is the base class. According to the scenario, a derived class of the base class might need to be assigned here, or this property needs to be casted to one of the possible derived classes. The available derived classes include , , , , , , , and .
An optional display name for the author.
The timestamp (in Unix time) when this message was created.
The timestamp (in Unix time) when this message was completed, if applicable.

Docs.param: The ID of the user who created the message (if applicable).
The ID of the agent who created the message (if applicable).
A unique identifier for this message.
A unique run ID, if this message was generated by a run process.
The thread to which this message belongs.
The role of this message's author.

The contents of the message. Please note is the base class. According to the scenario, a derived class of the base class might need to be assigned here, or this property needs to be casted to one of the possible derived classes. The available derived classes include , , , , , , , and .
An optional display name for the author.
The timestamp (in Unix time) when this message was created.
The timestamp (in Unix time) when this message was completed, if applicable.

Docs.param: Number of run (completion) tokens used over the course of the run.
Number of prompt tokens used over the course of the run step.
Total number of tokens used (prompt + run).
Details of the prompt tokens.

Docs.param: [Required] Uri of the data. Example: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2202330.
Dataset type.
Indicates if dataset is reference only or managed by dataset service. If true, the underlying data will be deleted when the dataset version is deleted.
Asset stage.
A unique identifier for the asset, assetId probably?.
The name of the resource.
The version of the resource.
The asset description text.
Tag dictionary. Tags can be added, removed, and updated.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.Evaluation Evaluation (string id = default, Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.InputData data = default, string displayName = default, string description = default, string status = default, System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,string> tags = default, System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,string> properties = default, System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.EvaluatorConfiguration> evaluators = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.Evaluation Evaluation(string id, class Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.InputData data, string displayName, string description, string status, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, string> tags, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, string> properties, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, class Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.EvaluatorConfiguration> evaluators) cil managed

Public Shared Function Evaluation (Optional id As String = Nothing, Optional data As InputData = Nothing, Optional displayName As String = Nothing, Optional description As String = Nothing, Optional status As String = Nothing, Optional tags As IDictionary(Of String, String) = Nothing, Optional properties As IDictionary(Of String, String) = Nothing, Optional evaluators As IDictionary(Of String, EvaluatorConfiguration) = Nothing) As Evaluation

static member Evaluation : string * Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.InputData * string * string * string * System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, string> * System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, string> * System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.EvaluatorConfiguration> -> Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.Evaluation
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.AIProjectsOneDPModelFactory.Evaluation (id, data, displayName, description, status, tags, properties, evaluators)

Docs.param: Identifier of the evaluation.

Data for evaluation. Please note is the base class. According to the scenario, a derived class of the base class might need to be assigned here, or this property needs to be casted to one of the possible derived classes. The available derived classes include .
Display Name for evaluation. It helps to find the evaluation easily in AI Foundry. It does not need to be unique.
Description of the evaluation. It can be used to store additional information about the evaluation and is mutable.
Status of the evaluation. It is set by service and is read-only.
Evaluation's tags. Unlike properties, tags are fully mutable.
Evaluation's properties. Unlike tags, properties are add-only. Once added, a property cannot be removed.
Evaluators to be used for the evaluation.

Docs.param: [Required] Uri of the data. Example: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2202330.
Indicates if dataset is reference only or managed by dataset service. If true, the underlying data will be deleted when the dataset version is deleted.
Asset stage.
A unique identifier for the asset, assetId probably?.
The name of the resource.
The version of the resource.
The asset description text.
Tag dictionary. Tags can be added, removed, and updated.
Indicates OpenAI Purpose. FileDatasets created with this field will be compatible with OpenAI-specific features.

Docs.param: Name of the deployment.
Publisher-specific name of the deployed model.
Publisher-specific version of the deployed model.
Name of the deployed model's publisher.
Capabilities of deployed model.
Sku of the model deployment.
Name of the connection the deployment comes from.

Public Shared Function PendingUploadRequest (Optional pendingUploadId As String = Nothing, Optional connectionName As String = Nothing, Optional pendingUploadType As PendingUploadType = Nothing) As PendingUploadRequest
static member PendingUploadRequest : string * string * Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.PendingUploadType -> Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.PendingUploadRequest
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.AIProjectsOneDPModelFactory.PendingUploadRequest (pendingUploadId, connectionName, pendingUploadType)

Docs.param: If PendingUploadId is not provided, a random GUID will be used.
Name of Azure blob storage connection to use for generating temporary SAS token.
TemporaryBlobReference is the only supported type.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.PendingUploadResponse PendingUploadResponse (Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.BlobReferenceForConsumption blobReferenceForConsumption = default, string pendingUploadId = default, string datasetVersion = default, Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.PendingUploadType pendingUploadType = default);

static member PendingUploadResponse : Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.BlobReferenceForConsumption * string * string * Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.PendingUploadType -> Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.PendingUploadResponse
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.AIProjectsOneDPModelFactory.PendingUploadResponse (blobReferenceForConsumption, pendingUploadId, datasetVersion, pendingUploadType)

Docs.param: Container-level read, write, list SAS.
ID for this upload request.
Version of dataset to be created if user did not specify version when initially creating upload.
TemporaryBlobReference is the only supported type.

Public Shared Function Run (Optional runId As String = Nothing, Optional createdAt As Long = 0, Optional completedAt As Long = 0, Optional runInputs As RunInputs = Nothing, Optional runOutputs As RunOutputs = Nothing, Optional userId As String = Nothing, Optional store As Nullable(Of Boolean) = Nothing) As Run
static member Run : string * int64 * int64 * Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.RunInputs * Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.RunOutputs * string * Nullable<bool> -> Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.Run
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.AIProjectsOneDPModelFactory.Run (runId, createdAt, completedAt, runInputs, runOutputs, userId, store)

Docs.param: Unique identifier for this run.
Timestamp when the run was initiated (Unix time).
Timestamp when the run finished processing (Unix time).
The inputs that were used to start this run.
The final outcome of this run, including status, output messages, token usage.
Identifier for the user making the request.
Flag indicating whether to store the run and associated messages.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.RunOutputs RunOutputs (Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.RunOutputsStatus status = default, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.ChatMessage> messages = default, Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.CompletionUsage usage = default, Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.RunOutputsIncompleteDetails incompleteDetails = default);

Public Shared Function RunOutputs (Optional status As RunOutputsStatus = Nothing, Optional messages As IEnumerable(Of ChatMessage) = Nothing, Optional usage As CompletionUsage = Nothing, Optional incompleteDetails As RunOutputsIncompleteDetails = Nothing) As RunOutputs

static member RunOutputs : Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.RunOutputsStatus * seq<Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.ChatMessage> * Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.CompletionUsage * Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.RunOutputsIncompleteDetails -> Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.RunOutputs
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.AIProjectsOneDPModelFactory.RunOutputs (status, messages, usage, incompleteDetails)

Docs.param: Final status of the run request. Known values: 'inProgress', 'incomplete', 'cancelled', 'failed', 'completed' - or custom string.

List of output messages generated by the agent. Please note is the base class. According to the scenario, a derived class of the base class might need to be assigned here, or this property needs to be casted to one of the possible derived classes. The available derived classes include , , , and .
Token usage details for this run.
Details about why the response is incomplete, if applicable.

Public Shared Function SystemMessage (Optional userId As String = Nothing, Optional agentId As String = Nothing, Optional messageId As String = Nothing, Optional agentRunId As String = Nothing, Optional threadId As String = Nothing, Optional content As IEnumerable(Of AIContent) = Nothing, Optional authorName As String = Nothing, Optional createdAt As Nullable(Of Long) = Nothing, Optional completedAt As Nullable(Of Long) = Nothing) As SystemMessage
static member SystemMessage : string * string * string * string * string * seq<Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.AIContent> * string * Nullable<int64> * Nullable<int64> -> Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.SystemMessage
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Projects.OneDP.AIProjectsOneDPModelFactory.SystemMessage (userId, agentId, messageId, agentRunId, threadId, content, authorName, createdAt, completedAt)

Docs.param: The ID of the user who created the message (if applicable).
The ID of the agent who created the message (if applicable).
A unique identifier for this message.
A unique run ID, if this message was generated by a run process.
The thread to which this message belongs.

The contents of the message. Please note is the base class. According to the scenario, a derived class of the base class might need to be assigned here, or this property needs to be casted to one of the possible derived classes. The available derived classes include , , , , , , , and .
An optional display name for the author.
The timestamp (in Unix time) when this message was created.
The timestamp (in Unix time) when this message was completed, if applicable.
